headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on WEC Energy Group, Raises Price Target to $117
summary: Barclays  analyst Nicholas Campanella   maintains WEC Energy Group (NYSE:WEC) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $111 to $117.
